perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a male host pointing toward a large text overlay while a render of a copper-colored iPhone 17 Pro is shown at the top of the frame. (2) The host stands in a studio setting with grey curtains, gesturing dynamically as he speaks. (3) Transitions show close-up renders of the phone's camera lenses and side buttons. (4) A sequence follows showing the phone in five different colors: gold, deep blue, silver, black, and a new copper/orange color. (5) A brief cutaway shows a retail display with various smartphones like vivo and realme. (6) Diagrammatic renders of the phone's front screen illustrate potential changes to the Dynamic Island and Face ID sensors. (7) The host concludes by pointing to his ear and gesturing towards 'subscribe' graphics.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic music starts immediately and remains constant throughout. (2) An adult male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese with an enthusiastic and rapid tone. (3) Periodic 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects (SFX) occur in synchronization with text appearances and scene transitions. (4) The soundscape is clean with no significant ambient noise, indicating a studio recording. (5) The music volume ducks slightly when the speaker emphasizes specific features but maintains a high vocal-to-music ratio.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: 'iPhone 17 Pro 新色曝光?!' (New color revealed?!) in large, bold font to grab attention. (2) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken content regarding aluminum frames and glass designs. (3) Branding Text: '3c有意思tim哥' and 'miko 米可手機館' logos appear consistently in the corners. (4) Descriptive Labels: '金色' (Gold), '深藍色' (Deep Blue), '銀色' (Silver), '經典黑' (Classic Black), and 'Orange' appear next to product renders. (5) Promotional Hook: '推薦大家買手機到米可' (Recommend everyone to buy phones at Miko) is used as a decorative call-out.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Detail Reveal -> Store Endorsement -> Future Feature Speculation -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting information throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male wearing a black flat cap, glasses, and a navy blue polo shirt with a white collar.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional studio setup with a neutral grey pleated curtain background and studio lighting; secondary scenes include digital renders of technology products and a brief shot of a physical phone retail store.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Information Enumeration -> Store Referral -> Closing CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To generate excitement and provide information about the rumored features and new color of the iPhone 17 Pro, while simultaneously acting as a marketing vehicle for the 'Miko' mobile phone retail chain in Taiwan.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal recommendation and persistent on-screen logos for the mobile store.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The creator's signature flat cap and glasses, combined with high-density variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses high-paced editing typical of tech influencers to maintain viewer retention while mixing rumor-based content with retail sponsorship.
